channel.title: Selena Monroe Archive
channel.description: Lore, worldbuilding, creature notes, and book-adjacent essays from The Monstrous Beloved.

item.title: What Is the Registry of Magical Practices?
item.description: Across The Monstrous Beloved, the Registry is the institution that decides what magic may be named, which creatures may be classified, and whose danger counts as official fact.

item.title: Bargains, Bindings, and Consent in The Binding Night
item.description: The Binding Night begins with a summoning mistake, but its central question is not how to escape the bond. It is whether a bond can be remade into something chosen.

item.title: Cauldmor Research Station and the Grief Beneath The Tide Keeps
item.description: Cauldmor Research Station turns scientific observation into gothic pressure: what is missing from the archive matters as much as what has been recorded.

item.title: Dream-Feeding, Creative Obsession, and Night's Own
item.description: Night's Own turns inspiration into something with teeth: a strix who feeds on dreams and a novelist who begins writing toward the dark.
